rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Elec. Code §253.0341, which governs restrictions on contributions to legislative caucuses during legislative sessions. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 253.0341. RESTRICTIONS ON CONTRIBUTIONS TO LEGISLATIVE CAUCUSES DURING AND FOLLOWING REGULAR LEGISLATIVE SESSION.
_note: Rule text concerns campaign finance restrictions on legislative caucus contributions; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
